title: cymbalaria muralis
intro: Cymbalaria muralis, also known as "toadflax" or "ivy-leaved toadflax," is a flowering plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cymbalaria muralis include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, and its potential to reduce stress and anxiety due to its calming effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
